title: Hydrogen
description: A very fast client modpack with couple hand-picked features and small visual improvements to enhance your gameplay
body:
![Hydrogen Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f653320eec7614e90adb9778edf2e98a3b95d029.png)
# <font color='#ffb3e7'>⚡Hydrogen <font color='#d7dae5'> Modpack
Hydrogen is a high performance modpack with addition improvements and QoL to aid your gameplay, work out of the box. The pack was first intended to be used on my development server, The Castle and also for making my cinematic replaymod YouTube videos!

## ☝️ Mission Ready
Hydrogen is made to focus on stability down to its core as it is being use as my daily driver which mean it is designed to be simple and handle whatever you put it through. A series of test and check is done for every update before it being roll out.

## 🌳 Features!
- Pre-configured and ready to play once installed
- Voice chat integrated
- All mainstream optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium and ImmediatelyFast are included
- Shaders support
- Chat heads
- Display saturation/exhaustion indicator on the hotbar

## 🍧 Special Thanks
These people supported and tested the project since its early days!
